ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "movie_title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "title_year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "gross_revenue" REAL /* Gross revenue of the movie */,
  "imdb_score" REAL /* IMDb score of the movie */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "facenumber_in_poster" INTEGER /* Number of faces in the movie poster */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the movie's release */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the movie */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "awards_won" TEXT /* Awards won by the director */,
  "filmography" TEXT /* Filmography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "awards_won" TEXT /* Awards won by the actor */,
  "filmography" TEXT /* Filmography of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-actor relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the movie */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* Description of the character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for sub-genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plot_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the plot keyword */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plot keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_plot_keywords" (
  "movie_keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-plot keyword relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plot keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_plot_keywords_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_plot_keywords_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES plot_keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Rating score given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's review */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the user's review */,
  "review_helpfulness" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., viewer, critic, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the version's release */,
  "changes_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of the version (e.g., re-release, remake, director's cut) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_versions_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the production company */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the production company's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "movie_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-production company relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "production_role" TEXT /* Role of the production company in the movie (e.g., production, distribution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_companies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_companies_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media profile */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Instagram, Facebook) */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers on the social media platform */,
  "posts" INTEGER /* Number of posts made on the social media platform */,
  "engagement" REAL /* Engagement rate on the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Actor, Best Director) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., newspaper, magazine, website) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
